entities.name: log_strength.py
entities.context: Python script for logging strength training sessions, located at Personal/Health/WorkoutTracker/

entities.name: WorkoutTracker
entities.context: V's personal health tracking system stored under Personal/Health/WorkoutTracker/

entities.name: RPE
entities.context: Rate of Perceived Exertion — a metric tracked per workout session

entities.name: Phase-Based Training
entities.context: Workout sessions are tagged with a current training phase, suggesting periodized programming

entities.name: Session Type
entities.context: Workout sessions are categorized by type (e.g., strength, hypertrophy, etc.)

entities.name: Pre/Post Workout Self-Assessment
entities.context: V tracks how he felt before and after each session as structured fields

relationships.context: Core logging script within V's WorkoutTracker system
RPE is a required parameter when logging a session
Each logged session is tagged with the current training phase
Sessions capture felt-before and felt-after as structured subjective data
